supported_methodologies.name: Scrum
supported_methodologies.focus: Sprint goals, dependencies within sprint boundaries.

supported_methodologies.name: SAFe
supported_methodologies.focus: Program Increments (PI), WSJF (Weighted Shortest Job First), cross-team dependencies.

out_of_scope.description: Explicitly defines what is not included in this work item to prevent scope creep.

compliance_and_security.description: Checklist for regulatory, compliance, and security standards.
compliance_and_security.jira_syntax:
h3. Compliance & Security Requirements
* Data Privacy / PII handled appropriately
* Threat model reviewed
* Automated security scans integrated
* Audit logging requirements met
compliance_and_security.gitlab_syntax:
### Compliance & Security Requirements
- [ ] Data Privacy / PII handled appropriately
- [ ] Threat model reviewed
- [ ] Automated security scans integrated
- [ ] Audit logging requirements met

Initiative_or_Standard_Epic.description: The highest level of the hierarchy. Represents a large strategic objective spanning multiple months or PIs.

heavyweight.jira:
h2. Strategic Context
[Explain the business value and why this is a priority now]

h2. Hypothesis / Expected Outcomes
* If we [action], we expect to see [measurable result].

h2. SAFe / Methodology Alignment
* *WSJF Score:* 
* *Target PI / Target Quarter:* 

h2. Success Metrics
* [Metric 1]
* [Metric 2]
heavyweight.gitlab:
## Strategic Context
[Explain the business value and why this is a priority now]

## Hypothesis / Expected Outcomes
* If we [action], we expect to see [measurable result].

## SAFe / Methodology Alignment
* **WSJF Score:** 
* **Target PI / Target Quarter:** 

## Success Metrics
* [Metric 1]
* [Metric 2]

/epic

Feature_or_Alternate_Epic.description: A shippable piece of functionality that delivers value to the user, broken down into stories.

heavyweight.jira:
h2. Problem Statement
[What problem are we solving for the user or system?]

h2. Proposed Solution
[High-level technical and product solution]

h2. Architecture & Technical Design
* *Design Doc:* [Link]
* *API Contracts:* [Link]
* *Database Changes:* [Brief description]

h2. Dependencies
* [List cross-team or external dependencies]

h2. Acceptance Criteria
# AC 1
# AC 2
heavyweight.gitlab:
## Problem Statement
[What problem are we solving for the user or system?]

## Proposed Solution

## Architecture & Technical Design

## Dependencies

1. AC 1

/label ~feature

lightweight.jira:
h2. Context
[Brief description of the feature and its value]

h2. Acceptance Criteria
* AC 1
* AC 2
lightweight.gitlab:

User_Story.description: The smallest unit of work, representing a single technical task or user-facing change.

heavyweight.jira:
h2. User Story
As a [role/system], I need to [action/implementation], so that [value/benefit].

h2. Technical Implementation Notes
[Detailed engineering notes, edge cases, algorithms, or refactoring required]

h2. Acceptance Criteria
* Given [context], when [event], then [outcome].
* Given [context], when [event], then [outcome].

h2. Testing & Automation Strategy
* *Unit Tests:* 
* *Integration Tests:* 
* *Performance/Load Tests:* [If applicable]

h2. Definition of Done Checklist
* Code reviewed and approved
* CI/CD pipeline passes (all automated tests green)
* Documentation updated
heavyweight.gitlab:
## User Story
As a [role/system], I need to [action/implementation], so that [value/benefit].

## Technical Implementation Notes
[Detailed engineering notes, edge cases, algorithms, or refactoring required]

## Acceptance Criteria
* **Given** [context], **when** [event], **then** [outcome].
* **Given** [context], **when** [event], **then** [outcome].

## Testing & Automation Strategy
* **Unit Tests:** 
* **Integration Tests:** 
* **Performance/Load Tests:** [If applicable]

## Definition of Done Checklist
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passes (all automated tests green)
- [ ] Documentation updated

/label ~story
/assign
